channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Connecting an ExpressRoute circuit to Megaport Virtual Edge
item.description: Megaport is an ExpressRoute partner in many locations. The Megaport Cloud Router (MCR) allows ExpressRoute customers to connect leased lines to their on-premise locations, and to connect other Cloud Providers. MCR is easy to set up and operate, it even automatically configures the ExpressRoute...
item.dc:creator: Marc de Droog

item.title: Windows Insider Program sign-in prompt closing
item.description: Every time I try to sign in to the Windows Insider program, the sign-in prompt opens. It just. Closes. It only shows me the icon of the sign in prompt, and after a few seconds, it closes. And I really want to be in the dev channel of the Windows Insider Program so I can have the best updates. OS...
item.dc:creator: Drakeka

item.title: Does anyone else fondly look back at the Windows Insider Program from 2014-15?
item.description: 2014-15 was when the Windows Insider Program got beta builds of Windows 10. I enrolled on Day 1, I would always download the updates ASAP on the family computer no matter how much it pissed off my sister. I got excited for new builds on Wednesdays and often looked at the Windows blog as well as...
item.dc:creator: Amiasop

item.title: Got my first mac on Windows PC
item.description: Microsoft unveils major Windows 11 preview program overhaul that actually lets you test its new features — Windows Insider Program gains new Experimental and Beta channels with feature flag control
item.dc:creator: Azaellow

item.title: Revo uninstaller not working and system apps can't be deleted
item.description: Hi everyone,I heard Revo Uninstaller is a good app uninstall and but it doesn't seem to work properly for windows system apps. Some apps either fail to uninstall completely or still leave behind files and registry entries. Even worse, there are certain system apps that I can't remove at all, no...
item.dc:creator: CalahanReed

item.title: Migrate Data Ingestion from Data Collector to Log Ingestion
item.description: HTTP Data Collector API in Log Analytics workspaces is being deprecated, and will be totally out of support in September 2026. Data Collector actions in logic app using already created API connections (which uses workspace Id & Key) would still work against old custom log tables, however, newly...
item.dc:creator: mshboul

item.title: Can no longer "log out" (signing out is not logging out)
item.description: Hello, Up until recently, when right clicking the Teams icon on the task bar, there was an option to Log Out of teams, which had the effect of logging out (re-opening the program would instantly lead to LOGGING IN). On the most recently release, this is gone. There is now only an option to SIGN...
item.dc:creator: Justin0880

item.title: Introducing Wildcard Roles in Azure Web PubSub: simpler, smarter permissions for real-time apps
item.description: Real-time interactivity is now a baseline expectation across industries, from collaborative dashboards to trading platforms, IoT monitoring, and live data visualizations. Developers need a way to broadcast data instantly to connected clients without worrying about connection management, scaling, or...
item.dc:creator: kevinguo

item.title: Automating Arc-enabled SQL Server license type configuration with Azure Policy
item.description: Azure Arc enables customers to onboard SQL Server instances - hosted on Linux or Windows - into Azure, regardless of where they are hosted: on‑premises, in multicloud environments, or at the edge. Once onboarded, these resources can be managed through the Azure Portal using services like Azure...
item.dc:creator: TomClaes

item.title: Safe youtube mp3 downloader and converter that still works 2026?
item.description: I have been trying to find a good solution but no luck so far. Is there anything out there in 2026 that is safe and not full of popups? A lot of online converters claim to be free and fast, but most seem unreliable or overloaded with ads, which honestly makes them feel unsafe.A lot of people still...
item.dc:creator: PrestonYork

item.title: Passwordless AKS Secrets: Sync Azure Key Vault with ESO + Workload Identity
item.description: Architecture High-level flow The solution uses a User-Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) federated to a Kubernetes Service Account via AKS OIDC—then ESO uses that identity to read secrets from Key Vault and write them into Kubernetes as Opaque secrets. Flow:Azure Key Vault → ESO → Kubernetes Secret...
item.dc:creator: fenildoshi2510

item.title: Azure Red Hat OpenShift: Managed Identity and Workload Identity now generally available
item.description: Azure Red Hat OpenShift now supports managed identities and workload identities as a generally available capability, so you can run OpenShift clusters and applications on Azure without long-lived service principal credentials.​ ARO, identity, and Azure governance With GA support for managed...
item.dc:creator: MelanieKraintz007

item.title: Windows 11 D Drive Space Drops Dramatically After Deleting Game
item.description: After emptying the recycle bin to delete a large game folder on Windows 11, my D drive space dropped drastically (from over 100GB to 40GB). Disk check found no errors. What's causing this? Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: Josew

item.title: Windows 11 How to hide the bottom-right version number
item.description: After updating Windows 11, the system build number shows up in the bottom-right corner. It’s distracting. How do I hide it?
item.dc:creator: Yhooum

item.title: How to stop the popup preview for taskbar icons ?
item.description: If I hover over a taskbar icon, I get a popup with a miniature view of the target page.This is very recent. I have no idea how I might have caused that. I haven't been in the registry recently.I use the "StartIsBack" app (AKA "StartAllBack"). It's an app that attempts to emulate the Win XP taskbar....
item.dc:creator: HunterApollo

item.title: Has Microsoft done something to mess up Microsoft accounts in the past week or so?
item.description: I am having all kinds of Microsoft account validation issues over the past few days on multiple devices. As an example, just 5 minutes ago, I got a notification saying that there is a problem with my account and it asks me to log back into my Microsoft account. But the moment I try to logon I get...
item.dc:creator: Paxon

item.title: Windows 11 Voice Access Toolbar Opens but Mic Button Does Nothing
item.description: Hi everyone,The Problem:Voice typing stopped working on my Win11 laptop (shows "disconnected" error). Friend has exact same model and Win11 version and theirs works perfectly. What I've Tried:Win+H opens the old toolbar, clicking mic does nothing.Switched to Voice Access (Win+U → Speech → On)....
item.dc:creator: NeonLaser

item.title: W11 (KB5079473) (26200.8037) Something strange when moving or copying file, see attached picture
item.description: Since a few days i get the following, as shown in the picture, when moving or copying a file with the right or left mouse button (see picture on the left):This is not normal behaviour. Then sometimes after i restart the PC, it goes like it should. (see picture on the right) Somebody else has this?...
item.dc:creator: Garciab

item.title: From Toil to Trust: How Azure SRE Agent Is Redefining Cloud Operations
item.description: As Azure environments scale, infrastructure teams face a familiar challenge: operating reliably at scale.Outages are no longer caused by a single VM or misconfigured service—they emerge from complex dependencies across compute, networking, storage, and platform services. Azure SRE Agent is designed...
item.dc:creator: siddhigupta

item.title: Enforcing new limits and retiring Opus 4.6 Fast from Copilot Pro+
item.description: As GitHub Copilot continues to rapidly grow, we continue to observe an increase in patterns of high concurrency and intense usage. While we understand this can be driven by legitimate… The post Enforcing new limits and retiring Opus 4.6 Fast from Copilot Pro+ appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Copilot usage metrics now aggregate Copilot cloud agent active user counts
item.description: Note: We’ve recently renamed Copilot coding agent to Copilot cloud agent. We will be updating our data schema for all existing coding agent fields to reflect this change in the… The post Copilot usage metrics now aggregate Copilot cloud agent active user counts appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: An update to the active flow billing model for Azure SRE Agent
item.description: Earlier today, we announced that Azure SRE Agent now supports multiple AI model providers, starting with Anthropic. To support multi-model choice, and make active usage costs easier to understand, we’re updating how active flow usage is measured, effective April 15, 2026. At a glance What’s...
item.dc:creator: Mayunk_Jain

item.title: Pausing new GitHub Copilot Pro trials
item.description: As GitHub Copilot continues to grow, we’ve seen a significant rise in abuse of our free trial system. To protect the experience and integrity of the platform for legitimate developers,… The post Pausing new GitHub Copilot Pro trials appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Actions workflows are limited to 50 reruns
item.description: Actions workflows are now limited to 50 reruns. Going forward, if you attempt to rerun a given workflow more than 50 times, you will get a failed check suite with… The post Actions workflows are limited to 50 reruns appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Copilot CLI activity now included in usage metrics totals and feature breakdowns
item.description: Previous CLI metrics releases added a standalone totals_by_cli section to the Copilot usage metrics API with session counts, request counts, and token usage. That section reported CLI activity separately from… The post Copilot CLI activity now included in usage metrics totals and feature breakdowns...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: A third-party connector integrating Claude with Microsoft Sentinel is now available
item.description: Security teams are increasingly exploring how AI assistants support them in investigating incidents, asking questions, and exploring their data. At the same time, controlling how data is accessed remains critical. Today, we’re sharing how Sentinel can support a third-party AI assistant like Claude...
item.dc:creator: mcasgrain

item.title: Securing multicloud (Azure, AWS & GCP) with Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Connector best practices
item.description: Many organizations run workloads across multiple cloud providers and need to maintain a strong security posture while ensuring interoperability. Microsoft Defender for Cloud is a cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) solution that helps secure these environments by providing unified...
item.dc:creator: ckyalo

item.title: OneDrive Office Hours | April 2026
item.description: Get ready for April’s OneDrive Customer Office Hours! This session creates space for open conversation around the latest updates and how they support the way you use your files every day. In this month’s session, we’ll walk through what’s new and open the floor for questions, feedback, and shared...
item.dc:creator: sophiapeng

item.title: Announcing Azure MCP Server 2.0 Stable Release for Self-Hosted Agentic Cloud Automation
item.description: Azure MCP Server 2.0 is now generally available, delivering first-class self-hosting, stronger security hardening, and a faster foundation for agentic workflows across Azure. The post Announcing Azure MCP Server 2.0 Stable Release for Self-Hosted Agentic Cloud Automation appeared first on Azure SDK...
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Sen

item.title: Service Mesh-Aware Request Tracing in AKS with Istio and Application Insights
item.description: Introduction As platforms evolve toward microservice‑based architectures, observability becomes more complex than ever. In Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), teams often rely on Istio to manage service‑to‑service communication and Azure Application Insights for application‑level telemetry. While both...
item.dc:creator: Siddhi_Singh

item.title: How to Ingest Microsoft Intune Logs into Microsoft Sentinel
item.description: For many organizations using Microsoft Intune to manage devices, integrating Intune logs into Microsoft Sentinel is an essential for security operations (Incorporate the device into the SEIM). By routing Intune’s device management and compliance data into your central SIEM, you gain a unified view...
item.dc:creator: PaulineMbabu

item.title: GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub Copilot CLI
item.description: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with the GitHub Copilot CLI, a step-by-step tutorial. The post GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub Copilot CLI appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Harrison

item.title: PowerShell MSI package deprecation and preview updates
item.description: This post announces the deprecation of MSI packaging beginning with PowerShell 7.7. The post PowerShell MSI package deprecation and preview updates appeared first on PowerShell Team.
item.dc:creator: Jason Helmick

item.title: Copilot cloud agent’s validation tools are now 20% faster
item.description: When Copilot cloud agent writes code, it automatically runs GitHub’s security and quality validation tools, including CodeQL, the GitHub Advisory Database, secret scanning, and Copilot code review. If any problems… The post Copilot cloud agent’s validation tools are now 20% faster appeared first on...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Update 26200.8079 Fails to Install with Error 0xc0000409
item.description: My Windows 11 Beta Channel Insider Preview update (26200.8079, KB5079482) keeps failing. It hits 100% instantly on reboot, then rolls back, showing error 0xc0000409. Anyone else having this issue, or know a fix?
item.dc:creator: Eorku

item.title: Windows 11 Pro won't activate, shows Home edition digital license
item.description: My Windows 11 Pro can't activate. Troubleshooting says the device only has a Home edition digital license. I tried reinstalling as per the official guide but it still doesn't work. Need help.
item.dc:creator: Yhooum

item.title: Windows11 Customization Update Stuck on Loading
item.description: My Windows11 shows "Customizing features, update 57% complete" but it's stuck on the loading screen. Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: ArkansasQuapaw

item.title: PHP 8.5 is now available on Azure App Service for Linux
item.description: PHP 8.5 is now available on Azure App Service for Linux across all public regions. You can create a new PHP 8.5 app through the Azure portal, automate it with the Azure CLI, or deploy using ARM/Bicep templates. PHP 8.5 brings several useful runtime improvements. It includes better diagnostics, with...
item.dc:creator: TulikaC

item.title: Intune enroll on redhat 10 KDE
item.description: **intune-portal 1.2603.31 fails to authenticate on RHEL 10 KDE Plasma — Misconfiguration(0) in gtk4/actions.rs** **Environment**- OS: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10- Desktop: KDE Plasma (Wayland, XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP=plasma)- intune-portal: 1.2603.31-1.el10.x86_64- microsoft-identity-broker:...
item.dc:creator: Brike

item.title: A simpler way to deploy your code to Azure App Service for Linux
item.description: We’ve added a new deployment experience for Azure App Service for Linux that makes it easier to get your code running on your web app. To get started, go to the Kudu/SCM site for your app: <sitename>.scm.azurewebsites.net From there, open the new Deployments experience. You can now deploy your app...
item.dc:creator: TulikaC

item.title: How do you run engagement surveys with Forms, effectively?
item.description: We run quarterly engagement surveys through Forms and the response rate is decent. But the problem is what happens after. The results go into a PowerPoint, leadership discusses it once, and then nothing changes until next quarter when we ask the same questions again. My boss asked me to find a way...
item.dc:creator: CandyMullany

item.title: How to create video with images using AI on windows?
item.description: Hey everyone,I heard it is easy to turn a bunch of photos into a simple video on a Windows PC using AI tools. In fact, there are built-in options like Microsoft Photos and traditional editors such as Windows Movie Maker, but they feel a bit basic or outdated for smoother transitions and...
item.dc:creator: Castiellm

item.title: Struggling to keep 1:1 meeting notes organized across weeks in Teams
item.description: I have 8 direct reports and we do weekly 1:1s. Right now I'm keeping notes in OneNote but theres no easy way to carry over action items from last week or see what we talked about 3 months ago without scrolling forever. Teams meeting notes are even worse because each meeting creates a separate note....
item.dc:creator: ClaireB

item.title: Leverage User and Group Assignments to Limit User Access to Apps
item.description: User and Group assignments can be added to Entra ID applications. Once assignments exist for an application, only assigned users can access that application. This method is a good way to secure access to applications that have consent to use high-profile permissions like Sites.FullControl.All or...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: OneNote breaks if I move it onto an external display
item.description: Hi guysI use OneNote extensively for work as my virtual notepad. At most of my working locations, I use my laptop - Dell Latitude 7440 - connected to either a Dell Docking station + 2 monitors, or a pair of samsung monitors which have an inbuilt hub, connect via USB-C and are daisychained together....
item.dc:creator: Alex_NTL

item.title: Tuesday night's UFL game between Dallas and St.
item.description: Louis on FS1 totaled 156,000 viewers. | Aidan Burke (UFL Center).
item.dc:creator: Sawyeryo

item.title: Flagging anti-cheat as a Trojan on Windows PC
item.description: I'm experiencing an issue where my anti-cheat software is being flagged as a Trojan by Windows Defender on my PC, and I'm not sure why this is happening or how to resolve it. I've tried to reinstall the anti-cheat software, update Windows Defender, and run a full system scan, but the issue...
item.dc:creator: Lawrencepp

item.title: The "IQ Layer": Microsoft’s Blueprint for the Agentic Enterprise
item.description: The "IQ Layer": Microsoft’s Blueprint for the Agentic Enterprise Modern enterprises have experimented with artificial intelligence for years, yet many deployments have struggled to move beyond basic automation and conversational interfaces. The fundamental limitation has not been the reasoning...
item.dc:creator: harshul05

item.title: Connecting Windows 11 users with Microsoft
item.description: "Listening to how we can keep making it better for you": Windows Insider meetups are coming back after years away, connecting Windows 11 users with Microsoft.
item.dc:creator: Brycennin

item.title: Can I still transfer data from Android to iPhone after setup without reset?
item.description: I already finished setting up my Samsung Galaxy S23 and recently got an iPhone 17 Pro Max. The problem is, I didn't use the "Move to iOS" option during the initial setup, and now all my data (photos, contacts, messages, etc.) is still on my Android phone. I really don't want to reset the iPhone...
item.dc:creator: GideonWells
